zh.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddy是Robert Purdye的女兒，於大約1552年出生在英國蘇格蘭。她於1566年7月13日與Johne Wilsone在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波卡農蓋特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Purdey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Purday
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French pour Dieu ‘for God(‘s sake)’, from frequent use of this expression as an oath. Pourdieu is also found as a surname in French. Compare Pardew , Godsave .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Purddy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French pour Dieu ‘for God(‘s sake)’, from frequent use of this expression as an oath. See also Perdue .

variants.name: Purdue
meanings: English (Hampshire and Middlesex): variant of   Purdy  .

variants.name: Perdue
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman and French origin): nickname from Old French par Dieu ‘by God’, which was adopted in Middle English in a variety of more or less heavily altered forms (compare e.g. Pardoe and Purdy ). The surname represents a nickname from a favorite oath. The surname in Ireland belonged to a French Protestant family who settled in County Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddy was born about 1552, in Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Purdye. She married Johne Wilsone on 13 July 1566, in Canongate, Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddy est née environ 1552, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Purdye. Elle a épousé Johne Wilsone le 13 juillet 1566, à Canongate, Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddyは約1552年にイギリススコットランドでRobert Purdyeの娘として生まれた。1566年7月13日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグカノンガトでJohne Wilsoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddy(은)는 대략 1552년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Robert Purdye의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1566년 7월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h 캔옹가트에서 Johne Wilsone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Helen Purdey or Purddy родилась около 1552 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Purdye. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johne Wilsone 13 июля 1566 г. в местности канонгэит, эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.
